title: The most insane week in AI
summary: A video roundup covering major AI releases and research in a single week, including model releases from DeepSeek, OpenAI, Alibaba Qwen, and Tencent, plus research projects in vision, game design, and robotics. The creator reviews and compares capabilities across these tools.
